Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a network load balancer

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to create network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start network load balancer on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is starting network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} stopped network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is stopping network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to stop network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting network load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
